checkpoints.action: Implement score-update.sh accepting --agent --event --note params, reading/writing ~/.claude/agent-scores.json with global+projects dual-track
Implement score-inject.sh: output tier+range (no exact score), recent 3 events, role-specific phrase, injected after role declaration before task instructions, for all 21 agents
Add score-inject.sh calls to dev.md at Steps 3/8/11 (BA/Dev/QA dispatch) and score-update.sh after QA (Step 12.0) and score summary at Step 15 report
Add AskUserQuestion 1-5★ with skip option + score-update.sh to close.md after CLOSE:YES only (CLOSE:NO does not trigger)

Implement TDAD Blast Radius Tool using Python ast + grep: emit confidence-tagged edges to dev-registry/<task_id>/blast-radius-map.json, hooks/ gaps as severity:critical, coverage_gaps when dependent_tests is empty

Implement test-writer agent: trigger on complexity_tier>=STANDARD or risk_level=high; generate tests/generated/<task_id>/test_AC*.py with pytest.fail('TEST_INCOMPLETE:...') hard-stops; generate manifest.json; hook_check auto-generated from AC JSON
Implement canary SessionStart hook: register in settings.json; behavior-test Write guard, Bash safety, git privilege guard, read size guard; zero stdout on success, stderr+exit 2 on failure

Fix session-info.sh and session-git-init.sh stdout→stderr; resolve LINE_LIMIT mismatch between pretool-read-size-guard.py (1000) and CLAUDE.md (600), update both to chosen value before canary registration
Update agents/ba.md Output JSON schema to include acceptance_criteria_path field pointing to docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-<task_id>.json
Update agents/qa.md failures[] verdict schema to require primary_cause enum (dev_issue|ba_issue) for score attribution
